articles.title: How to See Which Mac Apps Will Stop Working After macOS Golden Gate
articles.summary:
Apple is phasing out support for Rosetta 2, which is a feature that allows Intel-based apps to run on Apple silicon Macs. Rosetta is going to stop working for most apps in macOS 28, and when that happens, apps that use it will stop working.
 

 
 
 
Apple began warning customers and companies about the upcoming sunsetting of Rosetta with  macOS Tahoe , and the warnings go even further in  macOS Go

articles.summary: The Škoda Peaq, which will debut this summer as the European automaker’s flagship model, seats seven and has an intriguing design. It will almost certainly come with a hefty price tag.
articles.aiSummary: Škoda flagship EV—tangential interest for EV/car tech hobby monitoring.
